money_flow_summary: Companies pay for data to make better decisions — reducing risk, finding customers, optimizing operations. Money flows from enterprises to data vendors (Bloomberg, IRI, Dun & Bradstreet) who aggregate and sell datasets. The disruption opportunity: public data is now abundant and AI can extract signal from noise at near-zero cost, enabling solo operators to build proprietary data products that previously required analyst teams.

top_opportunities.title: Job Market Signals API (Hiring as a Leading Indicator)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Scrape LinkedIn, Indeed, and Greenhouse job postings daily for 50,000+ companies. Detect signals: surge in engineering hires (growth mode), sudden hiring freeze (trouble), new job titles that didn't exist 6 months ago (emerging trends). Sell API access to VCs, hedge funds, and recruiters at $299-$2,999/mo. The data is public; the intelligence layer is yours.
top_opportunities.moat: 12+ months of historical hiring data creates unique trend analysis; industry-specific signal models are non-trivial to replicate
top_opportunities.first_step: Build LinkedIn job scraper (or use SerpAPI); create 'company hiring velocity' metric; produce free weekly Substack report for VCs
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI categorizes job descriptions by function, seniority, and technology stack — turning 50k unstructured postings into structured intelligence daily

top_opportunities.title: Automated Competitive Intelligence Briefing SaaS
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Monitor competitor websites, pricing pages, product changelogs, job postings, G2 reviews, and press releases. Use LLM to synthesize weekly 1-page competitive brief: 'Competitor X just raised prices 20%, launched feature Y, and is hiring 15 engineers in Berlin.' Sell at $299-$999/mo to B2B SaaS companies with 3-20 direct competitors.
top_opportunities.moat: Historical competitive changelog creates institutional memory; integrating with Slack/email creates workflow dependency
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Playwright scraper for competitor pricing pages + ChangeDetection.io webhook; set up LLM brief generator; demo to 3 SaaS founders in your network
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI connects the dots between competitor pricing changes, new job postings, and product announcements to infer strategic shifts — analysis that takes an analyst 10+ hours

top_opportunities.title: Alternative Data Marketplace for Retail Investors (Newsletter + API)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Aggregate free alternative data: satellite parking lot traffic (via NASA public imagery), app download trends (SensorTower free tier), app store reviews sentiment, job listing counts, and Reddit/StockTwits sentiment. Package into weekly 'edge reports' per stock. Sell $29-$99/mo consumer tier and $299-$999/mo API tier to quant funds and retail traders.
top_opportunities.moat: Unique data combinations create alpha that standard sources don't offer; community of traders sharing signals creates network effect
top_opportunities.first_step: Pick 3 stocks in a sector you know well; produce a sample 'alternative data edge report'; post as free content on FinTwitter to validate demand
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI synthesizes 6 different data sources about one company into a single investment signal — replacing what quant funds spend $500k+ annually on third-party data for

top_opportunities.title: B2B Data Enrichment Agent (Better Than Apollo, For Niche Verticals)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a contact enrichment API that goes deeper than Apollo.io for specific verticals: e.g., for healthcare, include NPI numbers, practice size, insurance accepted, EMR system used. Scrape public directories, LinkedIn, and state licensing boards. Charge $99-$499/mo to SDRs and growth teams in that vertical. A single vertical with 10k target accounts is worth $500k in addressable market.
top_opportunities.moat: Vertical-specific data fields can't be scraped easily by horizontal competitors; accuracy advantage compounds over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Pick one vertical (dental, accounting firms, restaurants); identify 5 data fields Apollo doesn't have; build scraper for 1k records as demo
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI extracts structured data from messy public sources (dental practice websites, Yelp listings, state licensing PDFs) that no API provides
